entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `author` TEXT NOT NULL, `text` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_messages_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_messages_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`timestamp`)
